pi_items.source: setup_task.sh creates and loads the data into a database named 'chinook'
setup_task.sh explicitly updates 15 Invoice records to have a NULL BillingAddress
setup_task.sh explicitly updates 3 InvoiceLine records to have an incorrect UnitPrice of 99.99
task.json specifies the view name to be created
task.json specifies the index name to be created
task.json specifies the exact export file path
Checked the source SQL file; the Genre table contains exactly 25 genres.

pi_items.source: setup_task.sh downloads the dataset from the lerocha/chinook-database GitHub repository.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires fixing exactly 15 Invoice records with NULL BillingAddress and 3 InvoiceLine records with incorrect UnitPrices in the 'chinook' database. The database uses the standard Chinook dataset from Luis Rocha's repository, which contains exactly 25 genres in the Genre table. The final deliverables include a view named 'v_sales_by_genre', an index named 'idx_invoiceline_trackid', and an exported CSV file at '/home/ga/Documents/exports/chinook_genre_sales.csv'.
